log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Aven — Iron Concentration's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.

→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Lich's turn ---

→ Aven — Iron Concentration: CON save [d20:7+8=15 vs DC 20] FAIL! 32 necrotic damage. HP: 35/67

=== ROUND 4 ===

=== ROUND 5 ===
--- Aven — Iron Concentration's turn ---

→ Aven — Iron Concentration is affected by Greater Invisibility.

→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):8+8=16 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 5 rounds ===
